case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. LIBERTY BADIOLA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-20-2011 CONTINUED TO SEP-21-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-20-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCD, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED JUN-07-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BADIOLA, LIBERTY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-20-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $264.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,171.67 AS TO DEFENDANT BADIOLA, LIBERTY
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1. INTEREST 2. COSTS 3. ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BADIOLA, LIBERTY $3,907.49 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,907.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BADIOLA, LIBERTY

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BADIOLA, LIBERTY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-24-2010
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2011, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
